habilidadesResumidas.resumen: Quills (Ex) Any creature attacking a giant porcupine with light or one-handed melee weapons, natural weapons, or an unarmed strike takes 1d3 points of piercing damage. A creature that grapples a giant porcupine takes 2d4 points of piercing damage each round it does so.

habilidadesCompletas.texto: Quills (Ex) Any creature attacking a giant porcupine with light or one-handed melee weapons, natural weapons, or an unarmed strike takes 1d3 points of piercing damage. A creature that grapples a giant porcupine takes 2d4 points of piercing damage each round it does so.

fullStatBlock:
CR 2
Giant Porcupine
N Medium animal
Init +1
Senses low-light vision; Perception +6
AC 13, touch 11, flat-footed 12 (+1 Dex, +2 natural)
hp 22 ((3d8+9))
Fort +6, Ref +6, Will +2
Speed 40 ft.
Melee Tail Slap +6 (2d6+4 bludgeoning)
Special Abilities Quills (Ex) Any creature attacking a giant porcupine with light or one-handed melee weapons, natural weapons, or an unarmed strike takes 1d3 points of piercing damage. A creature that grapples a giant porcupine takes 2d4 points of piercing damage each round it does so.
Spell-Like Abilities none
Statistics Str 17, Dex 12, Con 16, Int 2, Wis 13, Cha 5
Base Atk +2; CMB +5; CMD 16
Feats Lightning Reflexes, Weapon Focus (tail slap)
Skills Climb +7, Perception +6
Environment  temperate forests or plains
Organization solitary, pair, or prickle (3-6)
Treasure none
Defensive Abilities quills
Source PFRPG Bestiary 3
